title: Mirroring mirrored date columns
excerpt: We have a specific date column on project boards that is very important (Kickoff Date). We mirror this column up to a medium-level board that lists all projects owned by that PM, then mirror those items up to a high-leve…

posts.author: nic.bonzani (Nic Bonzani)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a specific date column on project boards that is very important (Kickoff Date). We mirror this column up to a medium-level board that lists all projects owned by that PM, then mirror those items up to a high-level board that lists all projects owned by all PMs.

We’re running into an issue where the Kickoff Date can be mirrored up to the mid-level board fine, but we can’t mirror that date further up to the high-level board. This is a crucial date for us to work with, any ideas how we can best get this to work? I’ve tried using a formula to just “get” the date from the Mirror column and set another column to be equal to it, but you can’t use lookup columns in formulas so that didn’t work.

Any ideas?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@nic.bonzani

There should be no problem mirroring your mirrored date on the mid-level board up to the high-level board directly. What difficulty are you running into exactly?

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: nic.bonzani (Nic Bonzani)
posts.cookedHtml:
I simply get a message “This level of mirroring is not supported.” Not sure why! Thanks for taking a look!

image621×638 76.5 KB

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@nic.bonzani

Mirroring only works up to 2 levels deep (3 boards). You can mirror a mirror. But you cannot mirror a mirror of a mirror (or deeper). If you can remove one of the levels, it should work.

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: nic.bonzani (Nic Bonzani)
posts.cookedHtml: This is actually only 2 levels deep, you can see from the screenshot that other fields are fine to mirror it’s JUST the kickoff date one!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
So, the source for Kickoff Date and Project Start Date is the same?

If they are, I recommend contacting monday support.
